name: nested-table-style-inherit
description: Outer table with green style (C6EFCE shading, green borders). Inner table in cell (1,0) with orange style (FBE5D6 shading, orange borders).
expected_behavior: Outer table cells: green shading (C6EFCE). Inner table cells: orange shading (FBE5D6), resolved independently. Inner table should NOT inherit outer table's green shading.
current_status: GAP-003 — testing nested table style independence
